title: T-015 — work_order_costs + material_consumption_costs + labor_costs + overhead_allocations schema (§6.1 rows 7-10, §6.4)
prompt:
# T-015 — WO actual cost tables schema

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §6.1 rows 7, 8, 9, 10; §6.4 work_order_costs DDL (lines 336-377); §11.3 V-FIN-WO-01..08; §13.1 event subscriptions (lp.received/material.consumed/labor.recorded/waste.logged/wo.completed).
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Drizzle migration + ORM entries for `work_order_costs` (1:1 per WO, dual-cost actual+standard, cascade, yield, generated columns), `material_consumption_costs` (per consume tx), `labor_costs` (per manufacturing_operation), `overhead_allocations` (per cost center). RLS via foundation function. R13 audit on work_order_costs.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0055_wo_costs.sql`:
   - `CREATE TABLE work_order_costs` per §6.4 DDL lines 337-375 verbatim: id, org_id, wo_id FK UNIQUE → work_orders, cost_center_id FK, currency_id FK, material_cost_standard/labor_cost_standard/overhead_cost_standard NUMERIC(15,4), total_cost_standard GENERATED, material_cost_actual/labor_cost_actual/overhead_cost_actual/waste_cost_actual, total_cost_actual GENERATED, cascade_total_actual NUMERIC(15,4) DEFAULT 0, material_variance/labor_variance/overhead_variance/total_variance GENERATED, qty_produced_actual/qty_produced_standard NUMERIC(12,3), yield_variance_pct GENERATED, unit_cost_actual GENERATED, status CHECK IN ('open','closed','posted','reversed') DEFAULT 'open', costing_date TIMESTAMPTZ, posted_to_d365_at, d365_journal_id TEXT, created_at, updated_at, retention_until GENERATED, ext_jsonb.
   - Indexes: `idx_wo_costs_status` and `idx_wo_costs_posted` per §6.4 lines 376-377.
   - V-FIN-WO-02 CHECK: `currency_id IS NOT NULL`.
   - V-FIN-WO-05 partial CHECK enforced via APPLICATION (not DB) — close requires all outputs registered; trigger or function for status='closed' enforcement is acceptable.
   - `CREATE TABLE material_consumption_costs` (id, org_id, consumption_id FK→consumption_events (08-PROD), wo_id FK, item_id FK, lp_id FK→license_plates (05-WH), qty_kg NUMERIC(12,3), unit_cost NUMERIC(15,4), total_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (qty_kg * unit_cost) STORED, currency_id FK, cost_method_used TEXT CHECK IN ('fifo','wac'), fifo_layer_id UUID NULL, output_attribution_item_id UUID NULL, allocated_cost NUMERIC(15,4) NULL, transaction_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at).
   - `CREATE TABLE labor_costs` (id, org_id, wo_id FK, manufacturing_operation_id FK (per v3.1 standardization §1.2), user_id FK, cost_center_id FK, currency_id FK, hours_actual NUMERIC(8,2), hourly_rate NUMERIC(10,4), total_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (hours_actual * hourly_rate) STORED, recorded_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at).
   - `CREATE TABLE overhead_allocations` (id, org_id, wo_id FK, cost_center_id FK, currency_id FK, basis TEXT CHECK IN ('labor_hours','machine_hours','units'), basis_qty NUMERIC(12,3), rate NUMERIC(10,4), total_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (basis_qty * rate) STORED, calculated_at TIMESTAMPTZ).
   - All four tables: ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY via `app.current_org_id()`.
   - Partitioning hint (NFR §15.3): `material_consumption_costs` partitioned by `transaction_at` monthly (use pg_partman pattern or LIST partitioning — at minimum, create the parent table partition-ready with 2 next months as default partitions).
2. Drizzle ORM entries + register in index.ts.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0055_wo_costs.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/work-order-costs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/material-consumption-costs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/labor-costs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/overhead-allocations.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/wo-costs-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given migration 0055 ran, when \d work_order_costs inspected, then total_cost_standard/total_cost_actual/material_variance/yield_variance_pct/unit_cost_actual are all STORED GENERATED and status CHECK enforced. AND given pg_policies on all 4 tables, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() (no GUC reads).
- Given work_order_costs has UNIQUE(wo_id), when a second row for the same wo_id INSERTs, then it fails (V-FIN-WO-01). AND given missing wo_outputs and UPDATE work_order_costs SET status='closed', when trigger fires, then it fails (V-FIN-WO-05).
- Given material_consumption_costs INSERTed with qty_kg=10 and unit_cost=2.5000, when row selected, then total_cost = 25.0000 (GENERATED).
- Given material_consumption_costs is partitioned, when SELECT relname FROM pg_partitioned_table runs, then material_consumption_costs is listed.
_(AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: wo-costs-schema.test.ts asserts GENERATED columns, UNIQUE(wo_id), partitioning presence, RLS policy text, V-FIN-WO-05 close gate.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test wo-costs-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use REAL or DOUBLE PRECISION for currency — strictly NUMERIC(15,4) per PRD §6.4 to preserve audit precision.
- Do not skip the wo_id UNIQUE constraint on work_order_costs — V-FIN-WO-01 hinges on it.
- Do not skip retention_until GENERATED column — BRCGS 7y is mandatory.
- Do not omit partitioning on material_consumption_costs — NFR §15.3 demands it for 40k transactions/day at Apex Phase 1.
- Do not weaken RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
- Do not name FKs ambiguously — explicitly reference work_orders / consumption_events / license_plates / cost_centers / currencies (cross-module integrity).

pipeline_inputs.description: 4 WO actual cost tables: work_order_costs (UNIQUE wo_id, GENERATED total/variance/yield) + material_consumption_costs (partitioned monthly) + labor_costs (manufacturing_operation_id per v3.1) + overhead_allocations (per cost_center).
pipeline_inputs.details: All NUMERIC(15,4) for currency; GENERATED STORED for derived totals/variances/yield_pct; UNIQUE(wo_id) on work_order_costs; monthly partitioning on material_consumption_costs (40k tx/day at Phase 1); V-FIN-WO-05 close-gate trigger requires all outputs registered. Cross-module FKs to work_orders (08-PROD), license_plates (05-WH), consumption_events (08-PROD), cost_centers + currencies (T-002/T-003). [AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

AND given pg_policies on all 4 tables, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() (no GUC reads).

Given material_consumption_costs INSERTed with qty_kg=10 and unit_cost=2.5000, when row selected, then total_cost = 25.0000 (GENERATED).

Run pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test wo-costs-schema.

Do not omit partitioning on material_consumption_costs.
